overview.name: Auth JWT Variable
overview.description:
This scenario verifies JWT authentication flow using variables.
Test flow includes: 1. Create variables for login endpoint, resource endpoint, username and password. 2. Send POST login request using variable-based endpoint and body values. 3. Verify login response = 200. 4. Extract token from response. 5. Create Authorization header value using variable. 6. Send GET request to protected resource using variable-based endpoint and header. 7. Verify protected response = 200. 8. Reset JWT auth state using variable-based endpoint.
This scenario validates: - Variable injection into endpoint - Variable injection into request body - Variable injection into request headers - Variable extraction and reuse in auth flow

http.comment: Step 1-3. Login using variable-based endpoint and body

var.comment: Step 4. Extract JWT token from login response
var.name: token

http.comment: Step 6-7. Access protected resource using variable-based endpoint and header
Step 8. Reset JWT auth state using variable-based endpoint
